lastFailureMessage:
Startup hook did not produce a capture file. Exit code: 0. stdout: 欢迎使用 晓晨博客图片解析快速上传工具-腾讯云+社区，技术支持QQ群 4656606.Github: https://github.com/stulzq/BlogTools

Arguments:

  -c|--cookie       Required.Cookie file path.
  --uin             Required.
